programme.desc: The pursuit of a convicted felon ends with a head-on collision with a police cruiser; a shoplifting suspect shoots at police and then sets his own house on fire during a standoff; air and ground units coordinate during a high-speed chase.

programme.title: Fugitives Caught on Tape
programme.desc: A man wanted for robbery and carjacking leads sheriff's deputies on a chase through crowded city streets; police get in a foot chase with an attempted murder suspect; a late-night, 145-mile-an-hour highway pursuit; and more.

programme.title: Fugitives Caught on Tape
programme.desc: Law enforcement officers pursue fugitives on the run; deputies race to extract a mother and her daughters from their truck after a fleeing suspect crashes into them; fish and wildlife officers pursue a fugitive attempting to escape by swimming away.

programme.title: Fugitives Caught on Tape

programme.title: Fugitives Caught on Tape

programme.title: Fugitives Caught on Tape
programme.desc: An accused car thief jumps off a 36-foot bridge to avoid capture; an armed fugitive on the run breaks into a building full of law school students; a DUI suspect flees by car, foot, and water before deputies capture him.

programme.title: Predator Hunters
programme.desc: When a Houston cop seeks access to a mom's two kids, detectives go all in to stop one of their own; detectives team up to catch a predator with his pants down; two brave victims help Det. Godwin to expose a stepdad's horrific secret.

programme.title: Predator Hunters
programme.desc: When a predator with a disturbing past targets a minor, law enforcement agencies team up for a high-stakes takedown at a busy airport; then, a mom uncovers a predator's twisted scheme; detectives unmask one of their boldest predators yet.

programme.title: Predator Hunters
programme.desc: When a teacher's deviant messages to a minor surface, Detective Godwin pushes to uncover the extent of his crimes; a predator's warped idea of love triggers a dramatic takedown; detectives snare a predator who wants both boys and girls.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A naked woman is arrested for stealing a sheriff's pickup truck; a gym goer loses his cool and his clothing; and a golf pro spectator streaks into the spotlight.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest

programme.title: The King of Queens

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie don't make a good first impression on their new neighbours when they have a particularly loud argument.

programme.title: The King of Queens
